summary: Frontend-only unauthenticated UI verification of D2Synergy (single-file vanilla HTML/CSS/JS at /app/frontend/public/index.html). All 7 requested behaviors verified end-to-end via Playwright against the preview URL. Zero uncaught JS console errors, no page errors. Full-Screen Vault overlay opens/closes correctly, chips toggle 'active' state, gracefully shows 'Not signed in' message (as designed, since Bungie OAuth is not usable in preview).

test_results.load_no_console_errors: PASS — 0 console errors, 0 page errors after full load + full interaction sequence
test_results.hamburger_opens_drawer_with_vault_row: PASS — #syncDrawerBtn opens right drawer; row [data-testid=open-fullscreen-vault-row] visible with text 'Full-Screen Vault ❯'
test_results.vault_row_closes_drawer_and_opens_overla: PASS — overlay gets 'open' class; header shows 'Vault & Characters'
test_results.overlay_header_elements: PASS — vault-search-input, vault-element-filters (7 chips: All/Kinetic/Arc/Solar/Void/Stasis/Strand), vault-type-filters (All/Weapons/Armor), vault-reload-btn, vault-close-btn all present
test_results.not_signed_in_graceful_message: PASS — vault-body shows 'Could not load vault: Not signed in. Open the menu → Sign in with Bungie.net first. (Sign-in only works on the deployed GitHub Pages site.)'
test_results.chip_toggle_active_no_errors: PASS — clicking Arc element chip and Weapons type chip added 'active' class; no console errors
test_results.global_openFullScreenVault_defined: PASS — typeof window.openFullScreenVault === 'function' and calling it reopens the overlay

critical_code_review_comments: index.html is ~4453 lines — well over the 700-line guideline. Consider splitting into JS modules (rateLimitedFetch, manifest cache, Full-Screen Vault module, drawer/UI) for future maintainability. Not blocking.

Reliability core (rateLimitedFetch/getItemDefinition dedupe/localStorage manifest cache under key d2synergy_manifest_cache) and Phase 2 Full-Screen Vault are wired correctly (openFullScreenVault, closeFullScreenVault, buildFsFilters, renderFsBody, Escape handler at line 4435, Close button binding at 4431). No issues found.
'Not signed in' path correctly renders as an .fsState.err node — good UX; would suggest an explicit 'Sign in' CTA button inside the empty-state to guide the user (nice-to-have).

success_rate.backend: N/A (no backend to test per request)

test_credentials: None used (per request — Bungie OAuth intentionally not exercised)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static vanilla HTML/JS app at /app/frontend/public/index.html served over the preview URL. No React mount, no /api backend. Phase 2 Full-Screen Vault module starts near line 4187. All test-ids listed in the review request exist and behave as documented. Bungie OAuth cannot be tested in preview — do not attempt sign-in.
